recipes.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
instructions: Cook spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente, about 10 minutes.
While pasta cooks, fry bacon until crispy, then chop into pieces.
Beat eggs with grated parmesan and black pepper.
Drain pasta, reserving 1 cup pasta water.
Toss hot pasta with bacon and rendered fat.
Remove from heat, quickly stir in egg mixture, adding pasta water as needed.
Season with salt and pepper, serve immediately.
recipes.description: Classic Italian pasta dish with crispy bacon, creamy egg sauce, and parmesan cheese

recipes.name: Vegetable Stir Fry
instructions: Chop bell peppers and broccoli into bite-sized pieces.
Mince garlic and ginger.
Heat oil in a wok or large pan over high heat.
Add garlic and ginger, stir for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add harder vegetables (broccoli) first, stir for 3 minutes.
Add softer vegetables (peppers), stir for 2 minutes.
Add soy sauce, mix well for 1 minute.
Serve over cooked rice.
recipes.description: Quick and healthy vegetable stir fry with Asian flavors, perfect for busy weeknights

recipes.name: Grilled Chicken with Lemon
instructions: Mix olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, and rosemary in a bowl.
Coat chicken breasts with marinade and let sit for 10 minutes.
Preheat grill or grill pan to high heat.
Grill chicken for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through.
Squeeze fresh lemon over cooked chicken.
Let rest for 3 minutes before serving.
recipes.description: Light and flavorful Mediterranean grilled chicken with fresh lemon and herbs

recipes.name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Cream together butter and both sugars until light and fluffy.
Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
In separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda, and salt.
Gradually blend dry mixture into creamed mixture.
Stir in chocolate chips.
Drop spoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake for 9-11 minutes or until golden brown.
Cool on baking sheets for 2 minutes, then transfer to wire racks.
recipes.description: Classic homemade chocolate chip cookies, soft and chewy with melty chocolate

recipes.name: Butter Chicken Curry
instructions: Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces.
Melt butter in a large pan, add diced onions and cook until golden.
Add minced garlic and ginger, cook for 1 minute.
Add curry powder and tomato paste, cook for 2 minutes.
Add chicken pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
Add cream and simmer for 20 minutes until chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve over steamed rice.
recipes.description: Creamy and aromatic Indian butter chicken curry, rich and satisfying

recipes.name: Caesar Salad
instructions: Wash and chop romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
Make dressing: mash anchovies with garlic, mix with lemon juice and olive oil.
Toss lettuce with dressing.
Top with croutons and shaved parmesan cheese.
Serve immediately.
recipes.description: Fresh and crisp Caesar salad with creamy anchovy dressing and crunchy croutons

recipes.name: Tacos al Pastor
instructions: Slice pork thinly. Make marinade with chili, cumin, garlic, vinegar, and pineapple juice.
Marinate pork for at least 1 hour.
Cook marinated pork in a hot pan until caramelized, about 10 minutes.
Warm tortillas in a separate pan.
Grill pineapple slices until caramelized.
Fill tortillas with pork, top with pineapple, onion, and cilantro.
Serve with lime wedges.
recipes.description: Delicious Mexican-style pork tacos with caramelized pineapple and authentic spices

recipes.name: Salmon with Vegetables
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Arrange salmon on a baking sheet with vegetables.
Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice.
Season with salt, pepper, and fresh dill.
Bake for 15-20 minutes until salmon is cooked through.
Serve hot with lemon wedges.
recipes.description: Healthy and elegant baked salmon with roasted vegetables and fresh herbs
